qualifications.name: Bachelor of Arts (BA) in Law (Psychology / Politics / Industrial Psychology)
notes: Additional NWU requirements: NS(C) OR NC(V) for degree studies, OR full matriculation exemption; Home Language AND First Additional Language level 5 (60-69%); Selection: Placement process and adherence to minimum requirements of the faculty; Academic performance is important; Limited capacity.

notes: Additional NWU requirements: NS(C) OR NC(V) for degree studies, OR full matriculation exemption; Home Language level 4 (50-59%); First Additional Language level 4 (50-59%); Selection: Placement process and adherence to minimum requirements of the faculty; Academic performance is important; Limited capacity.

additional_support: Peer mentoring, tutorials and supplementary instruction in all official languages of NWU
